name: 4-20 mA Analog Sensor Interface
description: Efento 4-20 mA sensor interface allows users to connect analog sensors to the cloud. Device can be equipped with analog interfaces (2 x 4-20 mA). Sensors can be powered either from the device's battery or by an external power source. Data from the analog sensors can be presented as current (4-20 mA) or converted to other measurement types.
author: Akenza AG
